---
title: "SQLREPL Minimal"
format: html
execute:
  enabled: false
filters:
  - sqlrepl/_extensions/sqlrepl/sqlrepl.lua
---

## Setup

```{.sqlrepl setup="true" envir="demo1"}
CREATE TABLE demo (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  name TEXT
);

INSERT INTO demo VALUES (1, 'Ada'), (2, 'Linus');
```

## Exercise

```{.sqlrepl envir="demo1" exercise="task1"}

```

## Check

```{.sqlrepl envir="demo1" exercise="task1" check="true"}
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM demo) = 2 THEN true
    ELSE false
  END AS passed,
  CASE
    WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM demo) = 2 THEN 'Richtig'
    ELSE 'Es wurden nicht 2 Zeilen gefunden'
  END AS message;
```
